diagrams.title: Five Framework Activities Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential flow from Communication through Deployment with feedback loops
diagrams.purpose: Understand the core activities and their flow in software development

diagrams.title: Umbrella Activities Coverage
diagrams.description: Depicts umbrella activities as horizontal bars spanning all framework activities
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how umbrella activities support all phases throughout the project

diagrams.title: Process Model Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between generic model, specific models, and project instances
diagrams.purpose: Understand how generic models serve as templates for specific implementations

diagrams.title: Work Product Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how work products flow through different activities transforming inputs to outputs
diagrams.purpose: Understand how information and deliverables are created and refined through the process

visuals.title: A Generic Process Model
visuals.description: Visual diagram for a generic process model
